# Ringster

> AI-powered 24/7 phone agents that help small businesses, freelancers, and entrepreneurs never miss a customer call again.

Ringster provides AI receptionists that answer, qualify, and book calls around the clock. Built for solo founders and service businesses who need control without interruption.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Ringster's AI phone agents.
- [AI Receptionist](/ai-receptionist): How the AI receptionist handles inbound calls 24/7.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): Step-by-step walkthrough of setup and call flow.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Credit-based plans from Free to Enterprise.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about features, pricing, and integrations.
- [ROI Calculator](/roi-calculator): Estimate revenue recovered from missed calls.
- [About](/about): Our mission and team.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the Ringster team.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on AI call handling and small business growth.
- [Ebook](/ebook): Free guide to AI phone assistants.
- [Offer](/offer): Current promotional offer.

## Industry pages

- [AI Receptionist for Plumbers](/ai-receptionist-for-plumbers): Tailored for plumbing businesses.
- [AI Receptionist for HVAC](/ai-receptionist-for-hvac): Tailored for HVAC contractors.
- [AI Receptionist for Electricians](/ai-receptionist-for-electricians): Tailored for electrical contractors.
